en_title: The Vampire Lestat Just Gave Us a Jaw-Dropping Penultimate Episode
cn_title: 《吸血鬼莱斯特》倒数第二集惊爆眼球
subtitle: 浪漫之后的惊天斩首
opus_summary: 《吸血鬼莱斯特》第三季倒数第二集让路易与莱斯特终于重拾亲密，却也让梅里克召回克劳迪娅的亡灵，揭开他们共同的愧疚与悲痛。执行制片人Hannah Moscovitch讲述招魂戏及结尾斩首悬念的创作过程。

paragraphs.en: Spoilers follow for The Vampire Lestat Season 3, Episode 6 - “Montreal,” which is available on AMC and AMC+ now.
paragraphs.cn: 以下内容包含《吸血鬼莱斯特》第三季第6集《蒙特利尔》的剧透——本集现已在AMC及AMC+上线。

paragraphs.en: Season 3 of AMC’s series formerly known as Anne Rice's Interview With the Vampire has raced along like Lestat’s tour bus on nitrous. “Montreal,” the penultimate episode of this season, is an emotional roller coaster ride. For “Loustat” shippers, this episode gifts viewers with Lestat de Lioncourt (Sam Reid) and Louis de Pointe du Lac (Jacob Anderson) being on the same page, sharing emotional intimacy like we’ve never seen before. On the flip-side, the witch Merrick Mayfair (Sarah Afful) summons Claudia (Delainey Hayles) back to this earthly plain to metaphorically rip everyone’s hearts out in a devastating sequence that ranks as one of the show’s best.
paragraphs.cn: AMC这部曾名为《安妮·莱斯的吸血鬼访谈》的剧集第三季，节奏快得像莱斯特那辆充入一氧化二氮的巡演巴士。本季倒数第二集《蒙特利尔》是一场情绪过山车。对「Loustat」粉丝而言，本集让莱斯特·德·里昂科特（山姆·里德饰）与路易·德·庞特·杜拉克（雅各布·安德森饰）终于心意相通，分享了前所未有的情感亲密。另一方面，女巫梅里克·梅费尔（莎拉·阿富尔饰）召唤克劳迪娅（德莱尼·海尔斯饰）回到人世，在一段令人心碎的戏中从隐喻意义上撕裂所有人的心，这也成为本剧最出色的桥段之一。

paragraphs.en: For everyone who’s been holding out for a romantic episode for Lestat and Louis this season, they certainly get their wish with “Montreal.” Executive producer Hannah Moscovitch tells IGN that the writers’ room asked themselves what might it look like if they gave the pair their own version of Before Sunset, and voila!
paragraphs.cn: 本季一直期待莱斯特与路易拥有浪漫篇章的观众，在《蒙特利尔》中终于如愿。执行制片人Hannah Moscovitch告诉IGN，编剧室曾问自己：如果给这对搭档拍一部属于他们的《爱在日落黄昏时》，会是什么样子？答案就这样诞生了！

paragraphs.en: “It started with the image of Lestat and Louis rambling around Montreal on the eve of Lestat’s concert,” Moscovitch says of how it unfolded on the whiteboard. “From there, came Louis’ restaurant and a joint interview for Daniel Molloy [Eric Bogosian] with Louis and Lestat, rehearsal for the concert, and the release of the sex tape. Through it all is a slow finding their way back towards each other. The slow negotiation of their flaws, their failures of each other, and of course, of their biggest joint failure and grief, the killing of Claudia.”
paragraphs.cn: Moscovitch回忆他们如何在白板上展开构思：「一开始，我们想到的是莱斯特和路易在莱斯特演唱会前夕漫无目的地游荡在蒙特利尔。接着有了路易的餐厅、丹尼尔·莫洛伊（埃里克·博戈西安饰）对路易和莱斯特的联合采访、演唱会排练，以及性爱录像带的发布。在这一切过程中，他们慢慢找回彼此。他们缓慢地面对自己的缺点、彼此造成的失败，当然还有他们共同最大的失败与悲痛——杀死克劳迪娅。」

paragraphs.en: Their joint guilt at Claudia’s terrible fate at the vampire trial in Paris at the end of Season 2 has certainly plagued Louis to almost distraction. So, he brings the powerful witch Merrick Mayfair to Lestat’s Montreal residence to conjure Claudia’s spirit back to the mortal plain. Using Claudia’s diary and dress, they drag her back for the emotional unloading of all-time.
paragraphs.cn: 第二季结尾，克劳迪娅在巴黎吸血鬼审判中遭遇悲惨命运，路易与莱斯特共同背负的愧疚一直折磨着路易，几乎令他无法自持。因此，他把强大的女巫梅里克·梅费尔带到莱斯特在蒙特利尔的住所，召回克劳迪娅的灵魂。借助克劳迪娅的日记和裙子，他们将她拖回人世，展开一场前所未有的情绪倾诉。

paragraphs.en: For readers of Anne Rice’s books, this confrontation will be familiar as a similar event happens in Merrick (2000), the seventh book in the author’s The Vampire Chronicles series. So, the series is reaching far forward into Rice’s library to bring this incendiary moment to life.
paragraphs.cn: 对安妮·莱斯作品的读者来说，这场对峙并不陌生，因为作者《吸血鬼编年史》系列的第七本书《Merrick》（2000）中也发生过类似事件。因此，本剧深入莱斯特的作品库，将这个火药味十足的时刻搬上荧幕。

paragraphs.en: Moscovitch says they fast-forwarded so deep into book canon because they built the architecture of this season around Louis’ 2025 surge of grief for Claudia. “We were talking about it as early as Prague,” she says of their story-breaking while they were shooting there in Season 2. “[Showrunner] Rolin [Jones] brought the idea of the Merrick seance into the room from the get-go. We moved it around in [this] season but it felt climactic, these last moments with the actual ghost Claudia after having imposed or imprinted her on Regina. We knew we’d arrive at it late and it would close this chapter of grief for Louis (and Lestat).”
paragraphs.cn: Moscovitch表示，他们之所以如此深入原著设定，是因为本季的整体架构围绕路易在2025年因克劳迪娅而再次涌起的悲痛展开。「早在布拉格时我们就讨论过这件事，」她说。当时剧组正在那里拍摄第二季，并进行故事拆解。「（剧集运作人）罗林·琼斯从一开始就把梅里克招魂仪式的想法带进了编剧室。我们在本季调整了它的位置，但它感觉像高潮——克劳迪娅真正的鬼魂出现的最后时刻，此前我们已经把她强行施加或烙印在Regina身上。我们知道这段戏会在后期出现，并为路易（以及莱斯特）的悲痛篇章画上句号。」

paragraphs.en: What Louis and Lestat don’t expect from Claudia is the blinding rage and then utter desolation she reveals to them during their electrifying reunion. Delainey Hayles gives a raw performance that flares with anger, disappointment and then shattering sadness when she shares that she hasn’t been able to find the love of her life, Madeleine (Roxane Duran), in the afterlife.
paragraphs.cn: 路易与莱斯特没想到，克劳迪娅会在这场令人心潮澎湃的重逢中向他们展现出刺眼的愤怒，继而是彻底的绝望。德莱尼·海尔斯贡献了极其真挚的表演：当她说自己在死后世界没能找到此生挚爱玛德琳（罗克珊·杜兰饰）时，愤怒、失望与令人心碎的悲伤接连爆发。

paragraphs.en: Moscovitch says she was on set in Toronto for the seance filming with “Montreal” director Jane Wu (Blue Eye Samurai). “Delainey’s performance was, and always is, extraordinary,” Moscovitch says. “Delainey is fearless and nuanced and so strong as a performer, but I had not seen Delainey arrive at this level of grief and rage and heartbreak before. This was one level deeper. The writing called for that here, and I was jaw-dropped at the monitor.”
paragraphs.cn: Moscovitch表示，拍摄招魂仪式时她在多伦多片场，与《蒙特利尔》导演简·吴（《蓝眼武士》）一起工作。「德莱尼的表演过去如此、现在也始终如此出色，」Moscovitch说。「德莱尼作为演员无所畏惧、细腻而强大，但我以前从未见过她抵达如此深沉的悲痛、愤怒与心碎。这一次更深入了一层。这里的剧本就要求达到这种程度，我在监视器前看得目瞪口呆。」

paragraphs.en: Asked how they all helped Hayles navigate that day on set, Moscovitch says Wu made sure to give the actress space. “There was space built into the shooting day for Delainey to get the number of takes that were right for her. And Sam and Jacob admire and respect Delainey a huge amount. I watched them support her, hold her up, whisper to her how beautifully she was doing, and they never left the set. They were always there with her, even when the camera was pointed away from them, which was most of it. Aside from their talent, they are some of the most generous men I know.”
paragraphs.cn: 当被问及大家如何帮助海尔斯度过片场的那一天时，Moscovitch说，吴导演确保给这位演员足够的空间。「拍摄日程特意留出了余地，让德莱尼可以完成适合自己的拍摄次数。山姆和雅各布都非常欣赏并尊重德莱尼。我亲眼看着他们支持她、扶住她，低声告诉她表现得多么出色；他们从未离开片场。即使镜头转向别处（大多数时候确实如此），他们也一直陪着她。除了才华之外，他们也是我认识的最慷慨的人之一。」

paragraphs.en: Louis and Lestat (and the audience) are left emotionally stunned in the wake of their goodbye to Claudia. The episode ends with Louis and Lestat thoughtfully, and for once humbly, seated on a bench mulling their possible future together. And then out pops Daniel and Armand (Assad Zaman) who decapitate the pair in the cliffhanger to end all cliffhangers.
paragraphs.cn: 与克劳迪娅告别后，路易、莱斯特（以及观众）都陷入情绪上的震撼。剧集结尾，路易和莱斯特若有所思、而且难得谦卑地坐在长椅上，思索着两人可能的共同未来。随后丹尼尔与阿尔芒（阿萨德·扎曼饰）突然现身，将二人斩首，留下堪称「悬念之王」的惊天悬念。

paragraphs.en: Moscovitch confirms this was their intended ending of “Montreal” for a long time. “Everything is a little blurred at the beginning of the [writing] process but we know we have these scenes we want to include, and over time they land somewhere. We move them around a lot. But we knew it would be an episode ending.”
paragraphs.cn: Moscovitch确认，这个结尾很早就确定是《蒙特利尔》的结局。「（写作）过程开始时一切都还有些模糊，但我们知道有一些场景是一定要加入的，随着时间推移，它们会落到合适的位置。我们经常调整它们的位置，但我们知道这会成为一集的结尾。」

paragraphs.en: In explaining Armand’s actions, Moscovitch says he had lost his lifeline in the wake of Dubai, losing Louis and turning Daniel. “He wanted some complicated combination of atonement from Louis and Lestat, and to take a pained form of revenge on them,” she explains. “And that was winning Daniel over to him and fucking around on the edges trying to find his moment. We knew a part of the end of the season would be a taking back of the joy Lestat and Louis found, and a big ugly confrontation between our characters and within our characters, in their souls…”
paragraphs.cn: 在解释阿尔芒的行为时，Moscovitch说，迪拜事件之后他失去了自己的救命稻草：失去路易，并把丹尼尔变成吸血鬼。「他想从路易和莱斯特那里获得某种复杂的赎罪，同时以一种痛苦的方式向他们复仇，」她解释道。「于是他把丹尼尔争取到自己这边，在边缘不断试探，寻找属于自己的时机。我们知道，本季结尾的一部分会是把莱斯特和路易找到的快乐夺走，并让角色之间、以及角色内心深处的灵魂，迎来一场丑陋而激烈的对峙……」

paragraphs.en: Be sure to check back at IGN every Sunday for post-morts of The Vampire Lestat!
paragraphs.cn: 每周日记得回到IGN，查看《吸血鬼莱斯特》的剧后解析！
